name: GreenHouse Golf
about: GreenHouse Golf is a network of secure, solar-powered, climate-controlled trailers equipped with state-of-the-art golf simulators across Utah Valley. Through a simple membership and the GreenHouse app, users can play year-round for a fraction of the cost of traditional golf. The venue offers flexible memberships, shared student plans, and custom events to make golf accessible on any schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible 24/7 availability with up to 2 hours per day
Social student plans for budget-friendly golf
Unique setting for tournaments and group events
